"""
sep='\n'
created='2026-05-25 | 12:53 (UTC+3)'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
files=['governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md','scripts/update_agent_context.py','.github/workflows/curator-hourly-report.yml']
state={'bem':'BEM-842','created_at':created,'exists':{f:Path(f).exists() for f in files}}
state['status']='agent_context_verified' if state['exists'].get('governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md') and state['exists'].get('scripts/update_agent_context.py') else 'agent_context_missing'
Path('governance/state/bem842_agent_context_min_verify.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem842_agent_context_min_verify.md').write_text('# BEM-842 | Agent Context Min Verify | '+state['status']+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem842_agent_context_min_verify.json','governance/reports/bem842_agent_context_min_verify.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Minimal verification that AGENT_CONTEXT and updater exist')
"""
